free.description: Try AI-powered meeting assistance with a small free credit.

plus.description: Unlimited AI-powered meeting assistance. Summaries, reports, and project chat.

pro.description: Everything in Plus with advanced AI for deeper reports and Meeting Memory.
feature_bullets: Advanced AI for reports and analysis
Meeting Memory: AI remembers past meetings

feature_items.label: Advanced AI for reports and analysis
Meeting Memory: AI remembers past meetings

context_quilt.description: Your AI remembers past meetings and uses that knowledge automatically.
context_quilt.teaser_description: Your AI found connections to your past meetings
context_quilt.upgrade_cta: Upgrade to Pro to unlock Meeting Memory

meeting_reports.description: Generate shareable HTML reports from your meeting transcripts — sentiment, key moments, suggested tags, and your speaker notes.
meeting_reports.teaser_description: Reports turn your meetings into shareable summaries.
meeting_reports.upgrade_cta: Upgrade to Plus to generate shareable meeting reports

project_chat.description: Ask AI questions across all the meetings in a project — your AI knows the context.
project_chat.teaser_description: Project Chat is a Plus feature.
project_chat.upgrade_cta: Upgrade to Plus to use Project Chat
project_chat.teaser_response: Project Chat is a Plus feature. Upgrade to ask AI questions across all your meetings in this project.
